title: Tools Durability Warning
description: This client-side mod warns you when your tools/armors are about to break with visual, audio alerts.
body:
# Tools Durability Warning

### Never break your gear again

[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/URQ0rty4?style=for-the-badge&color=00AF5C&label=Downloads)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tools-durability-warning) [![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/URQ0rty4?style=for-the-badge&color=orange&label=Latest%20Ver)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tools-durability-warning/versions)

***

## What is this?

**Tools Durability Warning** is a simple utility mod that alerts you when your tools or armor are about to break. It helps you save your enchanted gear before it's too late.

![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8c4ca84edff085858ed5277b24ea2b05f6261b6.png)

***

## Features

| Feature | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Smart Warnings** | Alerts when durability drops below 5%, 10%, or 20% (Configurable). |
| **Visual & Audio** | Shows a warning in the action bar and plays a distinct sound. |
| **Universal Support** | Works for **Tools** and **Armor**. |
| **Mod Compatible** | Recognizes all damageable items, including modded tools. |

***
